name: Rosato’s
tagline: Great food, good company and a warm welcome.

address.landmark: You’ll find us on Malin Road, just a short walk from Moville town centre.

bookingNote: Bookings are for indoor dining only. Outdoor seating is walk-in.
bookingEnquiry: Planning a meal or organising a group? Give us a call or send us an email.
hoursSummary: Open 7 days · Kitchen from 16:00 Mon–Fri · from 15:00 Sat · from 12:30 Sun

giftCards.title: Give the gift of Rosato’s.
giftCards.body: Any amount, delivered by email — perfect for birthdays, thank-yous, or just because. Scan to buy, or tap the code on your own phone.
giftCards.label: Buy a gift card

room.title: A relaxed local for pints, dinner or a catch-up.
room.body: Serving locals and visitors alike, Rosato’s is a place to drop in for lunch, dinner, drinks or a night out.
room.imageAlt: Open fire in the stone hearth at Rosato’s, with the bar in the foreground

pint.title: Great pints.
pint.body: A wide range of beers, craft ales and wines.
pint.imageAlt: A pint of Guinness on the bar at Rosato’s

visit.title: Everything you need before you visit.
visit.parkingTip: Street parking along Malin Road; easier after the school run.

ordering.title: Make it your own…
ordering.intro: Order online, customise your pizza and collect from Rosato’s. No delivery — pick up at the bar.
ordering.payNote: Pay on collection — card or cash.
ordering.successMessage: Order received. We’ll have it ready for collection.
